info.title: OAuth 2.1
info.description: Endpoints for registering applications and managing OAuth 2.1 tokens.

post.description: Register a new OAuth app. Credentials are sent by email. No authentication required.
Issues a new client_secret and immediately invalidates the previous one. The client_id stays the same. Active user tokens are not affected.

201.description: Credentials rotated successfully. New credentials sent by email.

get.description: Redirects the user's browser to the Vendaze consent screen. **This endpoint must be opened in a browser — do not call it with fetch, axios, or any HTTP client.** The user must navigate to this URL so they can log in and approve access. Scopes are resolved from the app registration.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI registered with the application.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Random string you generate. Returned unchanged in the callback. Strongly recommended to prevent CSRF attacks.

302.description: Redirect to the Vendaze consent screen.

post.description: Exchange an authorization code for tokens, or refresh an access token using a refresh token.
Revoke an access token or refresh token. Returns 200 even if already revoked.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of people in the authorized workspace.

post.description: Creates a new person in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a person by ID with embedded company, tags, lists, and custom fields.

patch.description: Updates a person. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of companies in the authorized workspace.

post.description: Creates a new company in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a company by ID with embedded tags, lists, and custom fields.

patch.description: Updates a company. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of deals in the authorized workspace.

post.description: Creates a new deal in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a deal by ID with embedded pipeline, stage, products, and custom fields.

patch.description: Updates a deal. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tasks in the authorized workspace.

post.description: Creates a new task in the workspace.

patch.description: Updates a task. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Permanently removes the task from the workspace.

get.description: Returns activities. At least one entity filter (person_id, company_id, or deal_id) is required.

post.description: Creates an activity. At least one entity (person_id, company_id, or deal_id) must be provided.

delete.description: Permanently removes the activity from the workspace.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new product in the workspace.

patch.description: Updates a product. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns all tags in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new tag in the workspace.

patch.description: Updates a tag. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns all contact lists in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new contact list in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a contact list by ID.

patch.description: Updates a contact list. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns all custom fields in the workspace.

200.description: List of custom fields returned successfully.

post.description: Creates a new custom field in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a custom field by ID.

patch.description: Updates a custom field. Only fields included in the body are modified.

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

reminder.description: Type of email. Accepted values: personal, work, other.
Type of phone. Accepted values: mobile, work, residential, other.

description.example: Integration with Vendaze to sync contacts.

avatar_url.description: HTTPS URL of your app logo. Vendaze fetches the image, validates the format using magic bytes, and stores it. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. SVG is not accepted. Max 2MB.

scopes.description: Scopes your app needs. Users approve them individually on the consent screen.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Always a JPEG — Vendaze converts all formats on upload. Only present if avatar_url was provided in the request.

client_id.description: Current client_id of the app being rotated.

email.description: Email address registered with the app. Used to verify ownership. The API never reveals which email is on file.

app_name.description: New name shown to users on the consent screen. Max 100 chars. If omitted, the current name is kept.

description.description: New description of what your app does. Max 500 chars. If omitted, the current description is kept.

avatar_url.description: HTTPS URL of your app logo. Vendaze fetches the image, validates the format, converts to JPEG (max 400x400px), and stores it. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. SVG is not accepted. If omitted, the current avatar is kept.

redirect_uris.description: New list of HTTPS redirect URIs. Replaces the previous list entirely. If omitted, the current list is kept.

client_id.description: The app's client_id. Does not change after rotation.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Only present if avatar_url was provided in the request.

workspace_slug.description: Slug of the workspace the user authorized. Use this to identify the connected account in your app.

token.description: Access token to revoke. Must be the access_token (JWT), not the refresh_token.

value.description: Options array for select/multi_select fields; null for others.
Options array for select/multi_select fields; null for others.
Options array for select/multi_select fields; null for others.
